# Skinvestments

> Skinvestments helps CS2 players track a skin portfolio with valuations, price history, and alerts on web and mobile.

## Product

- [Home](https://skinvestments.app/): Main overview and core product value.
- [Features](https://skinvestments.app/features): Portfolio tracking, charts, and notifications.
- [Pricing](https://skinvestments.app/pricing): Free and paid plans for tracking and alerts.
- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/skinvestments-cs2-investments/id6757268598): iOS app download page.
- [Google Play](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.steamvestments): Android app download page.

## Support

- [FAQ](https://skinvestments.app/faq): Answers about Steam linking, billing, and exports.
- [Contact](https://skinvestments.app/contact): Support and issue reporting.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://skinvestments.app/privacy): How data is processed and protected.
- [Terms of Service](https://skinvestments.app/terms): Terms for using Skinvestments.

## Optional

- [Blog](https://skinvestments.app/blog): Updates and guides for CS2 skin investing.
- [KJ Labs Studio](https://kjlabs.studio/): The studio behind Skinvestments.
